query: Which file is the main Bicep entrypoint?
ground_truth: main.bicep is the orchestrator and is deployed at resource-group scope.

query: How do I enable network isolation?
ground_truth: Set the networkIsolation parameter to true in main.parameters.json or via azd env set NETWORK_ISOLATION true.
System-assigned managed identity by default, or user-assigned managed identity by setting useUAI to true.

query: Which feature flag controls Azure AI Foundry deployment?
ground_truth: deployAiFoundry toggles the AI Foundry account and project.

query: How do consumers reuse this landing zone?
ground_truth: Add it as a git submodule at infra/ pinned to a release tag, then override main.parameters.json and manifest.json from the consumer repo.
It carries landing-zone release metadata (tag, repo, ailz_tag) and an optional components array used by the jumpbox install.ps1 bootstrap.
Role assignments live in modules/security/* with role IDs centralised in constants/constants.bicep.

query: How do I deploy the landing zone end to end?
ground_truth: Run az login, azd auth login, then azd provision; main.parameters.json and azd env vars drive parameterisation.
